title: Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics2=1}}
{{Youmay|the regular feature in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''|the roleplaying sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]}}
{{MagazineDepartment
|image=[[File:Wanted_by_Cracken_SWAJ.jpg]]
|title="Wanted by Cracken"
|author=
|illustrator=
|editor=
|publisher=
|published in=''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''
|first issue=
|last issue=
}}
"'''Wanted by Cracken'''" was a series of articles presented in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. Following roughly the same format as the [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|book of the same name]], it profiled criminals wanted for various crimes by [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] chief [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]. It also included bounties and [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] stats for inclusion in games of ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.

==''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1==
The first ''Wanted by Cracken'' segment appeared in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal 1'']]. This issue introduces the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Cragus 12]], his ship, [[The Claw (Kazellis-class)|The Claw]], and his security droid, [[GX-99]].{{App

==''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 10==
This ''Wanted by Cracken'' segment appeared in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10]]''. This issue introduces a litany of criminals, from the slaver [[Borun Call]] to the miner [[Mihalik]] who decided to take justice into their own hands. This issue also includes:

*[[Ostan Atur]], a [[Lowen]] saboteur
*[[Rani Quanic]], a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]]<nowiki/>smuggler
*[[Talak]], a [[Reigat]] thug
*[[Drolen Antig]], a [[Nalroni/Legends|Nalroni]] [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]] and smuggler
*[[Kea Ra-Lan]], a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] thief
*[[Mar Balayan]], a [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] deserter and slaver
